steps.assistant_text: Masked-twin port from byte-exact donor game_uso_func_00003A28 (same eddproc_uso_func_000003BC alloc-init constructor family). Root cause: gl_func_000088B4 had two NM bodies — a stale struct-typed body (active, frame 0x30) and a maintained donor-port body sitting in a dead #else/#ifdef NON_MATCHING branch that never compiled. Promoted the flat int* donor-port form (decl-order p2,head,p1; p1-reuse-for-arg0; p1[0x40/4] condition re-load) which yields the tight two-web spill (frame 0x28). jal targets are USO placeholders (jal 0 in both build and expected) so reloc-blind exact. Verified 0 word diffs (incl reloc words) on DEFAULT build path; full ROM byte-identical; verify-blocks clean.

metadata.verification: default-build .o byte-exact vs expected/.o (0 word diffs incl reloc); make ROM byte-identical; make verify-blocks pass
